1. Look at `packages/generator-helper/` - what files exist, what the package.json looks like, what the main exports are (especially any GeneratorManifest, GeneratorOptions, generatorHandler exports)

11	  return entries.flatMap(({ entry, outfile }) => {
12	    const baseName = path.basename(outfile)
13	
14	    return [
15	      {
16	        name: `${baseName}-cjs`,
17	        format: 'cjs' as const,
18	        bundle: true,
19	        entryPoints: [entry],
20	        outfile,
21	        outExtension: { '.js': '.js' },
22	        emitTypes: true,
23	      },
24	      {
25	        name: `${baseName}-esm`,
26	        format: 'esm' as const,
27	        bundle: true,
28	        entryPoints: [entry],
29	        outfile,
30	        outExtension: { '.js': '.mjs' },
31	        emitTypes: true,
32	      },
33	    ]
34	  })

```typescript
])
```

```typescript
  {
    name: 'cjs',
    format: 'cjs',
    entryPoints: ['src/**/*.ts'],
    outdir: 'dist',
    outExtension: { '.js': '.js' },
    emitTypes: true,
```

13	} from './template'

15	const FILE_HEADER = `\
16	// Generated by @prisma/generator-rest-client. Do not edit manually.
17	// Re-run \`prisma generate\` to regenerate this file.
18	`

20	/**
21	 * Entry point for REST client code generation.
22	 *
23	 * Reads model and enum definitions from `options.dmmf` and writes a single
24	 * `rest-client.ts` file to the configured output directory. The generated
25	 * file contains:
26	 *   - TypeScript `enum` declarations for every Prisma enum
27	 *   - TypeScript `interface` declarations for every Prisma model
28	 *   - Per-model client classes implementing typed CRUD over HTTP
29	 *   - A `RestClient` interface aggregating all per-model clients
30	 *   - A `createRestClient(baseUrl)` factory function
31	 */
32	export async function generate(options: GeneratorOptions): Promise<void> {
33	  const outputDir = options.generator.output?.value
34	  if (!outputDir) {
35	    throw new Error('Output directory is not configured. Set `output` in the generator block.')
36	  }
37	
38	  await fs.mkdir(outputDir, { recursive: true })
39	
40	  const content = buildFileContent(options.dmmf.datamodel)
41	  await fs.writeFile(path.join(outputDir, 'rest-client.ts'), content, 'utf-8')
42	}
43	
44	function buildFileContent(datamodel: DMMF.Datamodel): string {
45	  const sections: string[] = [FILE_HEADER]
46	
47	  for (const dmmfEnum of datamodel.enums) {
48	    sections.push(renderEnum(dmmfEnum))
49	  }
50	
51	  for (const model of datamodel.models) {
52	    sections.push(renderModelInterface(model))
53	  }
54	
55	  for (const model of datamodel.models) {
56	    sections.push(renderModelClient(model))
57	  }
58	
59	  sections.push(renderRestClientInterface(datamodel.models))
60	  sections.push(renderFactory(datamodel.models))
61	
62	  return sections.join('\n\n') + '\n'
63	}

### Package files

- `onGenerate` delegates to `generate()` in `generator.ts`

- Writes a single `rest-client.ts` file

**`src/template.ts`** — String template helpers
- `fieldToTsType(field)` — maps Prisma scalar/enum/object fields to TypeScript types, handling lists and optionals
- `renderModelInterface(model)` — generates `export interface User { ... }` (scalar/enum fields only)
- `renderEnum(enum)` — generates `export enum Role { ... }`

- `renderRestClientInterface(models)` — generates the `export interface RestClient` with a camelCase property per model
- `renderFactory(models)` — generates `export function createRestClient(baseUrl): RestClient`

```prisma
generator restClient {
  provider = "prisma-generator-rest-client"

}
```

After `prisma generate`, `generated/rest-client/rest-client.ts` contains fully-typed interfaces, enums, per-model REST client classes, and a `createRestClient(baseUrl)` factory function ready to use.
